mapper.sql: id, user_id, recharge_num, recharge_type, recharge_account, status, balance, operator, description, recharge_time, operation_type, operation_time, out_trade_no, organid, majororganid
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tb_recharge_manage
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_recharge_manage (id, user_id, recharge_num, recharge_type, recharge_account, status, balance, operator, description, recharge_time, operation_type, operation_time, out_trade_no, organid, majororganid ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rechargeNum,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{rechargeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rechargeAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{balance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{operator,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rechargeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{operationType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{operationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{outTradeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

insert into tb_recharge_manage
id,
user_id,
recharge_num,
recharge_type,
recharge_account,
status,
balance,
operator,
description,
recharge_time,
operation_type,
operation_time,
out_trade_no,
organid,
majororganid,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{rechargeNum,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{rechargeType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{rechargeAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{balance,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{operator,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{rechargeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{operationType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{operationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{outTradeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
mapper.update:
update tb_recharge_manage
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
recharge_num = #{record.rechargeNum,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
recharge_type = #{record.rechargeType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
recharge_account = #{record.rechargeAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
balance = #{record.balance,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
operator = #{record.operator,jdbcType=INTEGER},
description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
recharge_time = #{record.rechargeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
operation_type = #{record.operationType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
operation_time = #{record.operationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
out_trade_no = #{record.outTradeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organid = #{record.organid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
majororganid = #{record.majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT},

update tb_recharge_manage set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, recharge_num = #{record.rechargeNum,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, recharge_type = #{record.rechargeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, recharge_account = #{record.rechargeAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, balance = #{record.balance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, operator = #{record.operator,jdbcType=INTEGER}, description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, recharge_time = #{record.rechargeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, operation_type = #{record.operationType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, operation_time = #{record.operationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, out_trade_no = #{record.outTradeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, organid = #{record.organid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, majororganid = #{record.majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_recharge_manage
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
recharge_num = #{rechargeNum,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
recharge_type = #{rechargeType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
recharge_account = #{rechargeAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
balance = #{balance,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
operator = #{operator,jdbcType=INTEGER},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
recharge_time = #{rechargeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
operation_type = #{operationType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
operation_time = #{operationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organid = #{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
majororganid = #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_recharge_manage set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, recharge_num = #{rechargeNum,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, recharge_type = #{rechargeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, recharge_account = #{rechargeAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, balance = #{balance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, operator = #{operator,jdbcType=INTEGER}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, recharge_time = #{rechargeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, operation_type = #{operationType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, operation_time = #{operationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, organid = #{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, majororganid = #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
